subcodes.first_line: O Ali! God willing, mayest thou, through the grace of the All-Merciful, dwell now and forever beneath the shade of the divine Lote-Tree [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای علی انشاء الله بعنایت رحمانی لم یزل و لایزال در ظل سدره الهیه ساکن باشید و
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
